Title: User Registration
Preconditions: User is on the registration page.
Test Data: Valid email, password, and confirm password.
Test Steps:
1. Enter a valid email address in the email field.
2. Enter a valid password in the password field.
3. Confirm the password in the confirm password field.
4. Click the register button.
Expected Result: User is registered successfully and redirected to the login page with a success message displayed.

Title: Invalid Email Registration
Preconditions: User is on the registration page.
Test Steps:
1. Enter an invalid email address in the email field.
2. Enter a valid password in the password field.
3. Confirm the password in the confirm password field.
4. Click the register button.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating an invalid email format.

Title: Password Mismatch During Registration
Preconditions: User is on the registration page.
Test Data: Valid email, different passwords in the password and confirm password fields.
Test Steps:
1. Enter a valid email address in the email field.
2. Enter a valid password in the password field.
3. Enter a different password in the confirm password field.
4. Click the register button.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating password mismatch.

Title: User Login
Preconditions: User is on the login page.
Test Steps:
1. Enter a valid email address in the email field.
2. Enter a valid password in the password field.
3. Click the login button.
Expected Result: User is logged in successfully and redirected to the dashboard with a success message displayed.

Title: Invalid Login Attempt
Preconditions: User is on the login page.
Test Steps:
1. Enter an invalid email address in the email field.
2. Enter a valid password in the password field.
3. Click the login button.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating incorrect login credentials.

Title: Flash Message Display
Preconditions: User is on any page where flash messages can be displayed.
Test Steps:
1. Trigger the display of a flash message.
2. Observe the flash message on the screen.
Expected Result: Flash message is displayed correctly and disappears after a few seconds.

Title: Event Creation from Notification
Preconditions: User receives a notification about an event creation.
Test Steps:
1. Receive a notification about an event creation.
2. Click on the notification to create the event.
Expected Result: Event is created successfully and user is redirected to the event details page.

Title: Event Joining from Notification
Preconditions: User receives a notification about an event joining.
Test Steps:
1. Receive a notification about an event joining.
2. Click on the notification to join the event.
Expected Result: User joins the event successfully and is redirected to the event details page.

Title: Profile Access from Notification
Preconditions: User receives a notification about profile access.
Test Steps:
1. Receive a notification about profile access.
2. Click on the notification to access the profile.
Expected Result: User accesses their profile successfully and is redirected to the profile page.

Title: Application Exit from Notification
Preconditions: User receives a notification about application exit.
Test Steps:
1. Receive a notification about application exit.
2. Click on the notification to exit the application.
Expected Result: Application exits successfully and user is prompted to save any unsaved changes.

Title: Newsletter Management
Preconditions: User is on the newsletter management page.
Test Data: List of emails to be added to the newsletter.
Test Steps:
1. Add a list of valid email addresses to the newsletter.
2. Click the send newsletter button.
Expected Result: Newsletter is sent successfully and a confirmation message is displayed.

Title: Invalid Email in Newsletter Management
Preconditions: User is on the newsletter management page.
Test Steps:
1. Add an invalid email address to the newsletter.
2. Click the send newsletter button.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating an invalid email format.

Title: Data Management Interaction
Preconditions: User is on the data management page.
Test Data: Data to be updated in the PostgreSQL database.
Test Steps:
1. Update the data in the PostgreSQL database.
2. Save the changes.
Expected Result: Data is updated successfully in the PostgreSQL database and a confirmation message is displayed.

Title: Database Connection Failure
Preconditions: User is on the data management page.
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to connect to the PostgreSQL database.
2. Simulate a connection failure.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating a database connection failure.

Title: Event Creation with Empty Fields
Preconditions: User is on the event creation page.
Test Data: No data entered in any fields.
Test Steps:
1. Leave all fields empty.
2. Click the create event button.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating that all fields are required.

Title: Event Creation with Valid Data
Preconditions: User is on the event creation page.
Test Data: Valid event name, date, and location.
Test Steps:
1. Enter a valid event name, date, and location.
2. Click the create event button.
Expected Result: Event is created successfully and user is redirected to the event details page.

Title: Event Joining with Invalid Event
Preconditions: User is on the event joining page.
Test Steps:
1. Enter an invalid event ID.
2. Click the join event button.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating that the event does not exist.

Title: Event Joining with Valid Event
Preconditions: User is on the event joining page.
Test Steps:
1. Enter a valid event ID.
2. Click the join event button.
Expected Result: User joins the event successfully and is redirected to the event details page.

Title: Event Viewing with Invalid Event
Preconditions: User is on the event viewing page.
Test Steps:
1. Enter an invalid event ID.
2. Click the view event button.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating that the event does not exist.

Title: Event Viewing with Valid Event
Preconditions: User is on the event viewing page.
Test Steps:
1. Enter a valid event ID.
2. Click the view event button.
Expected Result: User views the event details successfully and is redirected to the event details page.

Title: Profile Editing with Invalid Data
Preconditions: User is on the profile editing page.
Test Steps:
1. Enter invalid data in the profile fields.
2. Click the save profile button.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating that all fields are required.

Title: Profile Editing with Valid Data
Preconditions: User is on the profile editing page.
Test Data: Valid data (e.g., correct email, name, etc.).
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid data in the profile fields.
2. Click the save profile button.
Expected Result: Profile is updated successfully and a confirmation message is displayed.

Title: Exit Application with Unsaved Changes
Preconditions: User has unsaved changes in the application.
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to exit the application.
2. Confirm the exit prompt.
Expected Result: Application exits and prompts the user to save any unsaved changes.

Title: Exit Application with Saved Changes
Preconditions: User has saved changes in the application.
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to exit the application.
2. Confirm the exit prompt.
Expected Result: Application exits without prompting the user to save any unsaved changes.

Title: Notification Center with No Notifications
Preconditions: User is on the notification center page.
Test Steps: 1. Check the notification center page.
Expected Result: Notification center displays no notifications.

Title: Notification Center with Multiple Notifications
Preconditions: User is on the notification center page.
Test Steps: 1. Check the notification center page.
Expected Result: Notification center displays multiple notifications and allows the user to click on them to perform actions.

Title: Newsletter Management with No Emails
Preconditions: User is on the newsletter management page.
Test Steps: 1. Check the newsletter management page.
Expected Result: Newsletter management page displays no emails to be added.

Title: Newsletter Management with Multiple Emails
Preconditions: User is on the newsletter management page.
Test Steps:
1. Add multiple valid emails to the newsletter.
2. Click the send newsletter button.
Expected Result: Newsletter is sent successfully and a confirmation message is displayed.

Title: Data Management with No Data
Preconditions: User is on the data management page.
Test Steps: 1. Check the data management page.
Expected Result: Data management page displays no data to be updated.

Title: Data Management with Multiple Data Entries
Preconditions: User is on the data management page.
Test Data: Multiple data entries to be updated.
Test Steps:
1. Update multiple data entries in the PostgreSQL database.
2. Save the changes.
Expected Result: Data is updated successfully in the PostgreSQL database and a confirmation message is displayed.

Title: Event Creation with Maximum Length Names
Preconditions: User is on the event creation page.
Test Data: Event name with maximum allowed length.
Test Steps:
1. Enter an event name with the maximum allowed length.
2. Click the create event button.
Expected Result: Event is created successfully and user is redirected to the event details page.
